parameters.query: SELECT rs.*, ac.name as client_name FROM repurpose_sources rs LEFT JOIN agency_clients ac ON rs.client_id = ac.id WHERE rs.is_active = true AND (rs.last_checked_at IS NULL OR rs.last_checked_at < NOW() - (rs.check_interval_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL) LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'Convierte el siguiente contenido en posts para redes sociales en espanol mexicano.

Titulo: ' + $json.title + '
Descripcion: ' + $json.description + '
URL original: ' + $json.url + '
Instrucciones adicionales: ' + ($json.source.transform_instructions || 'Mantener tono profesional') + '

Genera EXACTAMENTE este JSON (sin markdown, sin ```):
{"linkedin": "articulo de 500-800 palabras con insights y CTA", "x_posts": ["post 1 max 280 chars", "post 2 max 280 chars", "post 3 max 280 chars"], "instagram": "caption con hashtags relevantes", "facebook": "post con engagement hooks", "image_prompt": "descriptive prompt in English for AI image"}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7, maxOutputTokens: 4096, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO content_queue (source_id, client_id, original_url, original_title, original_type, platform, caption, image_prompt, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, 'pending')
UPDATE repurpose_sources SET last_checked_at = NOW(), last_content_id = $2, total_items_processed = total_items_processed + 1 WHERE id = $1
